---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!-- 
This template addresses requirement: Feature Request Management
Location: Technical Specifications/2.7 Cross-Cutting Concerns/Development & Deployment
Purpose: To provide a structured format for submitting feature requests with all necessary details
-->

## Summary
<!-- Provide a concise summary of the feature request -->




## Problem Statement
<!-- Describe the problem that this feature will solve -->

### Current Situation
<!-- Describe what's not working or what's missing currently -->




### Impact
<!-- Explain who is affected and how -->




## Proposed Solution
<!-- Outline the proposed solution or feature -->

### Description
<!-- Provide a detailed description of the proposed feature -->




### Expected Benefits
<!-- List the benefits of implementing this feature -->




## Alternatives Considered
<!-- List any alternative solutions or features that were considered -->

### Alternative 1:




### Alternative 2:




### Why the proposed solution is better:




## Additional Context
<!-- Provide any additional context or screenshots to support the feature request -->

### Technical Considerations
<!-- Any technical details, architecture impacts, or implementation notes -->




### Screenshots/Mockups
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or mockups to help explain your feature -->




### Dependencies
<!-- List any dependencies or prerequisites for this feature -->




<!-- 
Before submitting, please check that you have:
- [ ] Provided a clear and concise feature summary
- [ ] Described the problem being solved
- [ ] Detailed the proposed solution
- [ ] Listed alternatives considered
- [ ] Added relevant context and screenshots (if applicable)
-->
